title: Fancy Crops X Bare Bones
description: Fancy Crops X Bare Bones its for fancy visuals
body:
**Fancy Crops × Bare Bone**

A fresh take on farming — now in the clean, colorful Bare Bones style!

Fancy Crops × Bare Bones retextures all crop-related blocks and plants with smoother colors, soft shading, and clear outlines — perfectly matching the Bare Bones aesthetic.
Designed for builders, farmers, and creators who love a minimal but lively look!

✨ Features

Reimagined wheat, carrots, potatoes, beetroot, and nether wart

Enhanced stems, vines, and saplings with cleaner visuals

Matching color palette and style from Bare Bones

Fully compatible with Better Bones and other Bare Bones-based packs

Lightweight and FPS-friendly

🧱 Compatibility

✅ Works with Minecraft 1.20+
✅ Works with Bare Bones, Better Bones, and similar packs
⚙️ Recommended for vanilla or performance setups (Sodium/Iris friendly)

💚 Credits

Original art style by **bebebea_loste**
Fancy Crops textures and tweaks by **phonextox7**
